_readme: Per-metric anchor PROVENANCE (stage-1 capture, 2026-06-26). Distilled from lumi_anchor_register_CLAUDECODE.json — the curator grade/est/source per ANCHORED metric. POSITIVE LIST of the 121 graded metrics; any question_id ABSENT here is UNKNOWN provenance by omission (never default to verified, never to estimate). grade A/B/C = sourced/verified (descending quality: A=verified-from-source, B=modest/broker-book, C=weakest-but-sourced); EST = estimate-flagged (no published source); est mirrors grade==EST. CAPTURE-ONLY: read at render in stage 2; NEVER feeds the gauge/verdict/score (metadata, not a value). Curated, David-owned, hot-reloaded; survives reseeds (benchmark_snapshots does not). Join key = question_id; orphan=0 vs the live snapshot. Coverage: 121 graded (113 A/B/C verified + 8 EST estimate) of 844 live question_ids -> ~86% UNKNOWN; stage-2 render fork (mark-verified vs three-state) is its own ruling.

CAR_STATUS_01.source: CIPD "Reward Management Survey 2022: Focus on employee benefits" (April 2022, ref tcm18-108776). Employer survey: 280 UK reward professionals, Oct 2021 (private 70%); item base n=217 for transport benefits. Grade A with modest-sample caveat. Verified from source PDF.
